name: Crockpot Cola Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the salt, pepper, and garlic powder. Rub this mixture over all sides of the roast.
2. If desired, brown the roast on all sides in vegetable oil using a Dutch oven. Remove any excess drippings.
3. Place the roast into the crockpot.
4. Mix together the remaining ingredients (cola, chili sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and hot sauce) and pour over the roast.
5. Cover with the lid and cook on high for 3 hours or until the roast is tender.
